text:
If a flat voice by shift's end is familiar, this compassion fatigue pattern needs a better reset.

Try this. Name what you have left to give today, offer exactly that amount. And let that be enough. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. You cannot pour from a tank you are not allowed to refill.
mediaAltText: Faceless vertical short on compassion_fatigue (broll + CosyVoice bank VO)
acceptance_layer: system working — Metricool dry-run only (not live publish)
